IsMinimumMoves(a: int, b: int, moves: int)\n  requires b > 0\n{\n  IsDivisibleAfterMoves(a, b, moves) &&\n  forall m | 0 <= m < moves :: !IsDivisibleAfterMoves(a, b, m)\n}\n\n// Prove (x + b) % b == x % b by case analysis\nlemma AddBMod(x: int, b: int)\n  requires b > 0\n  ensures (x + b) % b == x % b\n{\n  var r := x % b;\n  assert 0 <= r < b;\n  assert x == b * (x / b) + r;\n  // x + b == b * (x / b) + r + b == b * (x / b + 1) + r\n  // Since 0 <= r < b, by Euclidean division uniqueness:\n  // (x + b) / b == x / b + 1 and (x + b) % b == r == x % b\n  var q := x / b;\n  var y := x + b;\n  assert y == b * (q + 1) + r;\n  assert y - b * (q + 1) == r;\n  assert 0 <= r < b;\n  // Z3 should know: y % b == y - b * (y / b) and 0 <= y % b < b\n  // From y == b * (q+1) + r with 0 <= r < b:\n  // y / b must be q+1 and y % b must be r\n  // Help Z3 with explicit bounds:\n  assert b * (q + 1) <= y;\n  assert y < b * (q + 1) + b;\n  assert y < b * (q + 2);\n}\n\n// (b * k) % b == 0 by induction using AddBMod\nlemma MultModZero(b: int, k: nat)\n  requires b > 0\n  ensures (b * k) % b == 0\n{\n  if k == 0 {\n    assert b * 0 == 0;\n  } else {\n    MultModZero(b, k - 1);\n    assert b * k == b * (k - 1) + b;\n    AddBMod(b * (k - 1), b);\n    assert (b * (k - 1) + b) % b == (b * (k - 1)) % b == 0;\n  }\n}\n\n// (b * k + x) % b == x % b by induction\nlemma MultiplePlusMod(b: int, k: nat, x: int)\n  requires b > 0\n  ensures (b * k + x) % b == x % b\n{\n  if k == 0 {\n  } else {\n    MultiplePlusMod(b, k - 1, x);\n    assert b * k + x == (b * (k - 1) + x) + b;\n    AddBMod(b * (k - 1) + x, b);\n  }\n}\n\nmethod DivisibilityProblem(a: int, b: int) returns (moves: int)\n  requires a >= 1 && b >= 1\n  ensures IsMinimumMoves(a, b, moves)\n{\n  var r := a % b;\n  var q := a / b;\n  assert a == b * q + r;\n  assert 0 <= r < b;\n  assert q >= 0;\n\n  if r == 0 {\n    moves := 0;\n  } else {\n    moves := b - r;\n    assert 0 < moves < b;\n\n    // Prove (a + moves) % b == 0\n    assert a + moves == b * (q + 1);\n    MultiplePlusMod(b, q + 1, 0);\n    assert (a + moves) % b == 0;\n\n    // Prove minimality\n    forall m | 0 <= m < moves\n      ensures !IsDivisibleAfterMoves(a, b, m)\n    {\n      assert a + m == b * q + (r + m);\n      assert 0 < r + m < b;\n      MultiplePlusMod(b, q, r + m);\n      assert (a + m) % b == (r + m) % b;\n      assert (r + m) % b == r + m;\n      assert (a + m) % b != 0;\n    }\n  }\n}\n"}},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"rejected","resetsAt":1773824400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"ee22c9ea-764d-4666-8021-902f4446537f","session_id":"cadf97e5-90cc-4765-a29f-d5950b6d7447"},{"type":"assistant","message":{"id":"1426f04a-dd2f-4392-9272-7221584f6122","container":null,"model":"<synthetic>","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"stop_sequence","stop_sequence":"","type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":0,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":null,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":null,"iterations":null,"speed":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"You've
